---
# title: "CV"
# author: "Luke W. Johnston"
date: "`r cv::today_timestamp()`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    echo = FALSE,
    warning = FALSE,
    message = FALSE,
    results = "asis",
    comment = ""
)
# library(cv)
library(here)
devtools::load_all()
library(tidyverse)
library(RefManageR)
RefManageR::BibOptions(
    bib.style = "authoryear",
    first.inits = TRUE,
    style = "markdown",
    max.names = Inf,
    sorting = "ydnt"
    # no.print.fields = NULL
)
cv_data <- read_cv_items() %>% 
    filter(year(start) >= 2019)
bib_items <- read_bib_items() %>% 
    filter(year >= 2019)
rpkgs <- cv::rpackages
```

```{r list-education}
list_education("Educational degrees attained.")
```

```{r list-employment}
cv_data %>% 
    filter(year(start) %in% 2017:2022) %>% 
    list_employment("Employment in last 5 years.")
```

## Dissemination activities 

**Publications**

```{r list-articles}
bib_items %>% 
    filter(str_detect(title, "teaching|r-cubed", negate = TRUE)) %>% 
    list_publications("Journal articles") 
```

**Presentations**

```{r list-presentations}
bib_items %>% 
    filter(str_detect(title, "[tT]each|r-cubed", negate = TRUE)) %>% 
    list_publications("presentations")
```

**R packages**

```{r list-r-packages}
list_rpackages(rpkgs) 
```

## Project funding

```{r list-funding}
list_funding(cv_data)
```

## Awards and external funding

```{r}
read_cv_items() %>% 
    filter(section == "awards", str_detect(title, "Travel|Ontario|Studentship", negate = TRUE)) %>% 
    list_awards("Showing all awards, excluding travel grants, during PhD and postdoc.")
```
